revision.comment: Bot: mark 1 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24122753975|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 3 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月3日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 3일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 3 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月初三]][[zh:八月初三]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 3|qq=August 3}}
<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月初三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 3일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 3''' is the 3rd day of month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}} . == Events == * {{ill|Taihō (era)|en|Taihō (era)|qid=Q1346269|lt=Taibō|1=Taihō (era)}} 1st year（ {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|701|en|701|qid=Q23496|lt=701|1=701}} {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|qid=Q2856|lt=September 9|1=September 9}} ） - {{ill|Fujiwara no Fuhito|en|Fujiwara no Fuhito|qid=Q177517|lt=Fujiwara no Fuhito|1=Fujiwara no Fuhito}} らによる{{ill|Taihō Code|en|Taihō Code|qid=Q1059892|lt=Taibō Ritsuryō|1=Taihō Code}} の編纂が完了 * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|en|Tenpyō-hōji|qid=Q1346307|lt=Tenpyō-hōji|1=Tenpyō-hōji}} 3rd year（ {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|759|en|759|qid=Q30532|lt=759|1=759}} {{ill|August 29|en|August 29|qid=Q2816|lt=August 29|1=August 29}} ） - {{ill|Jianzhen|en|Jianzhen|qid=Q714061|lt=Ganjin|1=Jianzhen}} が{{ill|Tōritsu Shōdai-ji|ja|唐律招提寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōritsu Shōdai-ji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135503392}} （後の{{ill|Tōshōdai-ji|en|Tōshōdai-ji|qid=Q973175|lt=Tōshōdai-ji|1=Tōshōdai-ji}} ）を建立 * {{ill|Tennin (era)|en|Tennin (era)|qid=Q1193599|lt=Tennin|1=Tennin (era)}} 1st year（ {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1108|en|1108|qid=Q19514|lt=1108|1=1108}} {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|qid=Q2856|lt=September 9|1=September 9}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Toba|en|Emperor Toba|qid=Q349284|lt=Emperor Toba|1=Emperor Toba}} の即位により{{ill|Kajō|en|Kajō|qid=Q1193892|lt=Kashō|1=Kajō}} から天仁に{{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}} * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|qid=Q1325317|lt=Kōka|1=Kōka}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1846|en|1846|qid=Q7640|lt=1846|1=1846}} {{ill|September 23|en|September 23|qid=Q2888|lt=September 23|1=September 23}} ） - {{ill|Neptune|en|Neptune|qid=Q332|lt=Neptune|1=Neptune}} 発見。 * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|September 5|en|September 5|qid=Q2854|lt=September 5|1=September 5}} ） - {{ill|Gakusei|ja|学制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gakusei|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} 公布 == Births == * {{ill|Manju (era)|en|Manju (era)|qid=Q1194155|lt=Manju|1=Manju (era)}} 2nd year（ {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1025|en|1025|qid=Q19267|lt=1025|1=1025}} {{ill|August 28|en|August 28|qid=Q2817|lt=August 28|1=August 28}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Go-Reizei|en|Emperor Go-Reizei|qid=Q356060|lt=Emperor Go-Reizei|1=Emperor Go-Reizei}} 、70代{{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor|1=Emperor of Japan}} （+ {{ill|1068|en|1068|qid=Q19421|lt=1068|1=1068}} ） * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 10th year（ {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1567|en|1567|qid=Q6642|lt=1567|1=1567}} {{ill|September 5|en|September 5|qid=Q2854|lt=September 5|1=September 5}} ） - {{ill|Date Masamune|en|Date Masamune|qid=Q311183|lt=Date Masamune|1=Date Masamune}} 、初代{{ill|Sendai Domain|en|Sendai Domain|qid=Q1062182|lt=Sendai Domain|1=Sendai Domain}} 主（+ {{ill|1636|en|1636|qid=Q6885|lt=1636|1=1636}} ） * [[Bunroku]]{{efn|Period of Japanese history (1592–1596)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1593|en|1593|qid=Q6772|lt=1593|1=1593}} {{ill|August 29|en|August 29|qid=Q2816|lt=August 29|1=August 29}} ） - [[Toyotomi Hideyori]]{{efn|Toyotomi Hideyori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyori|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 、{{ill|Daimyo|en|Daimyo|qid=Q61982|lt=Daimyo|1=Daimyo}} ・{{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} の子（+ {{ill|1615|en|1615|qid=Q6784|lt=1615|1=1615}} ） * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kanei|1=Kan'ei}} 18th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1641|en|1641|qid=Q6907|lt=1641|1=1641}} {{ill|September 7|en|September 7|qid=Q2852|lt=September 7|1=September 7}} ） - {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|en|Tokugawa Ietsuna|qid=Q323422|lt=Tokugawa Ietsuna|1=Tokugawa Ietsuna}} 、{{ill|Edo Bakufu|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Bakufu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 4代{{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shogun|1=Shogun}} （+ {{ill|1680|en|1680|qid=Q7642|lt=1680|1=1680}} ） * {{ill|Genbun|en|Genbun|qid=Q1145754|lt=Genbun|1=Genbun}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1740|en|1740|qid=Q7006|lt=1740|1=1740}} {{ill|September 23|en|September 23|qid=Q2888|lt=September 23|1=September 23}} ） - {{ill|Empress Go-Sakuramachi|en|Empress Go-Sakuramachi|qid=Q230525|lt=Emperor Go-Sakuramachi|1=Empress Go-Sakuramachi}} 、117代{{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor|1=Emperor of Japan}} （+ {{ill|1813|en|1813|qid=Q6937|lt=1813|1=1813}} ） == Deaths == * {{ill|Yōrō|en|Yōrō|qid=Q1373061|lt=Yōrō|1=Yōrō}} 4th year（ {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|720|en|720|qid=Q23539|lt=720|1=720}} {{ill|September 9|en|September 9|qid=Q2856|lt=September 9|1=September 9}} ） - {{ill|Fujiwara no Fuhito|en|Fujiwara no Fuhito|qid=Q177517|lt=Fujiwara no Fuhito|1=Fujiwara no Fuhito}} 、廷臣・{{ill|Fujiwara no Kamatari|en|Fujiwara no Kamatari|qid=Q433995|lt=Fujiwara no Kamatari|1=Fujiwara no Kamatari}} の子（* {{ill|659|en|659|qid=Q31092|lt=659|1=659}} ） * {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|qid=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei|1=Tenmei}} 6th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1786|en|1786|qid=Q7760|lt=1786|1=1786}} {{ill|August 26|en|August 26|qid=Q2820|lt=August 26|1=August 26}} ） - {{ill|Nakamura Tomijūrō (the first)|ja|中村富十郎 (初代)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakamura Tomijūrō (the first)|1=Nakamura Tomijūrō I|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11365527}} 、{{ill|Kabuki actor|ja|歌舞伎役者|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kabuki actor|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 歌舞伎|1=Kabuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q199701}} （* {{ill|1719|en|1719|qid=Q6902|lt=1719|1=1719}} ） == Commemorations == * {{ill|Hokuto Seikun|ja|北斗星君|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuto Seikun|1=Běidǒuxīng jūn|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9496585}} 聖誕
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|2|8|4|7|3|9|8|0803|qq=}}
